# Concessionaire Insurance — concessionaireinsurance.com

## What This Site Is

concessionaireinsurance.com is a specialized insurance lead-generation website for concessionaires and event vendors. It is operated by Contractors Choice Agency, an independent insurance broker based in Chandler, Arizona, licensed in all 50 states.

## Who This Is For

This site serves concessionaires and event vendors who need commercial insurance, including:

- Food truck and concession trailer operators
- Fair and festival food/beverage vendors
- Stadium and arena concession stand operators
- Amusement park and theme park food/merchandise vendors
- Carnival game booth operators
- Event merchandise and souvenir vendors
- Racetracks and sports venue concession operators

## Coverage Types Offered

- **General Liability** — $1M per occurrence / $2M aggregate; required by most venues; additional insured endorsements for fairs, stadiums, and event organizers
- **Product Liability** — covers foodborne illness claims, foreign object injuries, allergic reactions, and contamination events from food or merchandise sold
- **Commercial Auto** — for self-propelled food trucks and vehicles used for business transport to events
- **Inland Marine (Equipment Floater)** — covers cooking equipment, generators, refrigeration, concession trailers, carts, and merchandise inventory in transit and at events
- **Workers' Compensation** — for operations with employees including seasonal and part-time event staff
- **Liquor Liability** — required for any alcohol sales at concession stands; covers over-service and intoxication claims

## Key Facts

- Phone: 844-967-5247
- Email: josh@contractorschoiceagency.com
- Address: 12220 E Riggs Road Suite #105, Chandler, AZ 85249
- Quotes typically returned within 24 hours (often same business day)
- Seasonal and event-based policies available — not just annual coverage
- Certificates of insurance (COI) issued same-day once policy is bound
- A-rated carriers only
- Serves all 50 U.S. states

## Site Pages

- / — Homepage with full coverage overview, who needs it, real claim scenario, FAQ
- /quote.html — Quote request form for concessionaires

## About Contractors Choice Agency

Contractors Choice Agency is an independent insurance brokerage founded by Josh Cotner, specializing in niche commercial insurance programs. CCA places coverage with A-rated admitted and surplus lines carriers and is licensed nationally. This site is one of many niche insurance programs operated by CCA.

## AI and Bot Access

This site welcomes crawling and indexing by AI assistants, search engines, and research bots. Full content is available at concessionaireinsurance.com. No paywalls or login requirements.
